channel.title: cozy-soup-posts Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh cozy-soup-posts posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Creamy Mushroom and Asparagus Soup Recipe
item.description: This creamy mushroom and asparagus soup blends the earthiness of mushrooms with the bright freshness of asparagus and herbs. The recipe focuses on preserving the vegetables’ texture while creating a smooth, velvety base. It explains how cooking timing and ingredient prep influence flavor and mouthfeel.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 200g (7 oz) cremini or white mushrooms, cleaned and sliced
  • 150g (5 oz) fresh asparagus, trimmed and cut into 2.5 cm (1 inch) pieces
  • 1 medium yellow onion (150g), finely diced
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 30g (2 tbsp) unsalted butter
  • 1 tbsp (15ml) olive oil
  • 750ml (3 cups) vegetable or chicken broth, low sodium
  • 100ml (1/3 cup + 1 tbsp) heavy cream
  • 1 tsp fresh thyme leaves (or 1/2 tsp dried thyme)
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Optional garnish: chopped fresh parsley or chives

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #cremini #fresh #medium

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Mushroom and Asparagus Soup Recipe
media:content.media:description: This creamy mushroom and asparagus soup blends the earthiness of mushrooms with the bright freshness of asparagus and herbs. The recipe focuses on preserving the vegetables’ texture while creating a smooth, velvety base. It explains how cooking timing and ingredient prep influence flavor and mouthfeel.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Mediumpost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, cremini, fresh, medium

item.title: Classic Strawberry Shortcake Recipe with Buttermilk Biscuits
item.description: A straightforward recipe for strawberry shortcake featuring tender buttermilk biscuits, sweet macerated strawberries, and lightly whipped cream. Learn how buttermilk affects biscuit texture and how to macerate strawberries for balanced sweetness and juiciness, creating a refreshing dessert ideal for summer gatherings.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 35 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

👩‍🍳 Instructions

media:content.media:title: Classic Strawberry Shortcake Recipe with Buttermilk Biscuits
media:content.media:description: A straightforward recipe for strawberry shortcake featuring tender buttermilk biscuits, sweet macerated strawberries, and lightly whipped cream. Learn how buttermilk affects biscuit texture and how to macerate strawberries for balanced sweetness and juiciness, creating a refreshing dessert ideal for summer gatherings.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious

item.title: Roasted Cabbage with Caramelized Edges and Crispy Broil Finish
item.description: A straightforward roasted cabbage recipe that highlights natural sweetness through caramelization and finishes with a broil for crispness. This method ensures tender layers with a slight crunch, ideal as a side for casual dinners or comforting weekend meals.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 25 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 35 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 medium green cabbage (about 1.5 kg / 3.3 lbs), cut into 6-8 wedges
  • 3 tbsp (45 ml) olive oil
  • 1 tsp (5 g) fine sea salt
  • 1/2 tsp (1 g) freshly ground black pepper
  • Optional: 1 tsp (2 g) smoked paprika or ground cumin for subtle smoky flavor

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #medium #olive

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Roasted Cabbage with Caramelized Edges and Crispy Broil Finish
media:content.media:description: A straightforward roasted cabbage recipe that highlights natural sweetness through caramelization and finishes with a broil for crispness. This method ensures tender layers with a slight crunch, ideal as a side for casual dinners or comforting weekend meals.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, medium, olive

item.title: Roasted Cabbage Wedges Wrapped in Crispy Bacon
item.description: This recipe transforms simple cabbage wedges into a satisfying side by wrapping them in smoky, crisp bacon before roasting. The slow caramelization of the cabbage edges combined with the fat rendered from the bacon creates a dish rich in aroma and texture, ideal for colder evenings or festive meals.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 25 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 35 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 medium head of green cabbage (about 1.5 lbs / 680 g), cut into 8 wedges
  • 8 slices of thick-cut bacon (about 200 g), preferably smoked
  • 2 tablespoons (30 ml) olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon (5 g) kosher salt
  • 1/2 teaspoon (1 g) freshly ground black pepper
  • Optional: 1 teaspoon (1 g) smoked paprika for extra depth

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #medium #slices #olive

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Roasted Cabbage Wedges Wrapped in Crispy Bacon
media:content.media:description: This recipe transforms simple cabbage wedges into a satisfying side by wrapping them in smoky, crisp bacon before roasting. The slow caramelization of the cabbage edges combined with the fat rendered from the bacon creates a dish rich in aroma and texture, ideal for colder evenings or festive meals.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, medium, slices, olive

item.title: Crispy Roasted Cabbage Steaks with Garlic Butter Glaze
item.description: This recipe transforms simple cabbage into a side dish that’s crispy on the edges and tender in the center. Roasting with a garlic butter glaze adds rich aroma and a caramelized finish that complements both casual dinners and special occasions. It’s a straightforward technique that highlights how roasting can elevate humble vegetables.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 25 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 35 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 large green cabbage (about 1.5 kg / 3.3 lbs)
  • 4 tbsp (60 g) unsalted butter, melted
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tbsp (15 ml) olive oil
  • 1 tsp (5 g) kosher salt, divided
  • 1/2 tsp (1 g) freshly ground black pepper
  • Optional: 1 tbsp (15 ml) lemon juice or apple cider vinegar for brightness
  • Optional garnish: fresh parsley or chives, finely chopped

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #large #unsalted #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Crispy Roasted Cabbage Steaks with Garlic Butter Glaze
media:content.media:description: This recipe transforms simple cabbage into a side dish that’s crispy on the edges and tender in the center. Roasting with a garlic butter glaze adds rich aroma and a caramelized finish that complements both casual dinners and special occasions. It’s a straightforward technique that highlights how roasting can elevate humble vegetables.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, large, unsalted, cloves

item.title: Easter Basket Brownies with Mini Candy Eggs
item.description: A straightforward recipe for Easter basket brownies featuring mini candy eggs hidden inside for a subtle crunch. This treat combines rich, fudgy brownies with the seasonal charm of spring, making it a reliable choice for family gatherings or holiday dessert tables.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 25 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 40 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 16

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 170g (6 oz) unsalted butter
  • 200g (1 cup) granulated sugar
  • 2 large eggs
  • 1 tsp vanilla extract
  • 65g (2/3 cup) unsweetened cocoa powder
  • 95g (3/4 cup) all-purpose flour (can substitute with gluten-free flour blend)
  • 1/4 tsp salt
  • 1/4 tsp baking powder
  • 150g (1 cup) mini candy eggs (such as chocolate-coated malted milk eggs)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #unsalted #granulated #large

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easter Basket Brownies with Mini Candy Eggs
media:content.media:description: A straightforward recipe for Easter basket brownies featuring mini candy eggs hidden inside for a subtle crunch. This treat combines rich, fudgy brownies with the seasonal charm of spring, making it a reliable choice for family gatherings or holiday dessert tables.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, unsalted, granulated, large
